generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to maintain our nation's security. Recent reports show that our allies are increasingly relying on us for defense, but at what cost to our own preparedness? We can't afford to be the world's policeman while neglecting our own civil liberties and public safety. It's time to prioritize strategic autonomy and ensure our nation is secure from within. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
